escalations.description: Swarm P0 #1319 now in 5th consecutive unresolved cycle: 18 dead PIDs, 2 cron collision groups, 85.7% agents queued. Requires human to run git worktree prune, clean /tmp PIDs, fix cron schedule.

Swarm P0 #1289: API credit/quota exhaustion caused 26.5% agent failures (155 total). pr-merger-agent-cloud circuit breaker not preventing rapid retries. Human action: replenish credits for claude-code, copilot, gemini, codex.

escalationRules.notes: No kernel-squad escalation triggers fired. P0 swarm health issues are infrastructure-level and require human action — not resolvable by kernel squad.

dogfoodObservations.description: Worktree governance silent failure (#1376) — FIXED by PR #1391. claude-hook-wrapper.sh now probes local binary with --version; if it crashes (ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND for @red-codes/storage), falls back to main worktree binary via git worktree list --porcelain. Fail-safe: if no fallback, clears AGENTGUARD_BIN to trigger bootstrap exemption handler.
No governance denials encountered during this EM cycle. AgentGuard operating normally.
